zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Smythe於大約1578年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，她的父親Henry Smyth35歲，母親Mrs. Brydgett Smyth25歲。她於1595年5月15日與Robert Moulton在英國諾福爾可姆斯比結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1636年4月27日之前在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。

nameMeanings.name: Smythe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Smith
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Smythe was born about 1578, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Smyth, was 35 and her mother, Mrs. Brydgett Smyth, was 25. She married Robert Moulton on 15 May 1595, in Hemsby, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died before 27 April 1636, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Smythe est née environ 1578, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Smyth, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Brydgett Smyth, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Moulton le 15 mai 1595, à Hemsby, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée avant 27 avril 1636, à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Saint Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby Saint: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿
ko.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Smythe(이)가 대략 1578년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Smyth(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Brydgett Smyth(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1595년 5월 15일 영국 노르폴크 헤스비에서 Robert Moulton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1636년 4월 27일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Moulton em 15 de maio de 1595, em Hemsby, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Smythe родилась около 1578 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Smyth было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Brydgett Smyth, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Moulton 15 мая 1595 г. в местности хемсби, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла перед 27 апрель 1636 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
